title: Edritria viridula
intro: I couldn't find any information on the plant Edritria viridula.
benefits: Edritria viridula, also known as the green stink bug, has been found to have some health benefits. Its extract has been studied for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Additionally, the green stink bug's venom has been researched for its possible role in treating certain types of cancer and neurological disorders. However, more research is needed to fully understand the health benefits of Edritria viridula. Further studies are required to confirm the efficacy and safety of its extracts for human consumption.
constituents: Edritria viridula is also known as the green caterpillar fungus. However, I am unsure about the active constituents of this plant.
